Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Apne shared issues ke around organize karo. Apne log find karo. Ek saath action lo.

Footer.mission: Apne zindagi mein zyada se zyada acha badlav lane ka whose hum soch bhi nahi sakte.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Badlav ko loud hona zaroori nahi hai powerful hone ke liye
Home.description: Doosre log find karo jinke paas same issues hain. Ek saath action lo. Quiet Riots logon ko shared frustrations ke paas connect karta hai aur complaints ko collective action mein badal deta hai.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Kisi bhi frustration ko search karo — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. Agar exist karti hai toh hum dikhaayenge ki kitne log isse share karte hain.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Same issue ko sab organisations mein dekho, ya ek organisation ke sab issues. Jaise tango dancers direction badlate hain.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideas, actions, aur community — apke time aur skills ke according. Chote actions bade changes laate hain.
Home.missionQuote: "Apne zindagi mein zyada se zyada acha badlav lane ka whose hum soch bhi nahi sakte."
Home.basedOn: Simon Darling ki 2014 ki kitaab Quiet Riots par based

Issues.title: Issues
Issues.subtitle: {count} issues {categoryCount} categories mein. Apna find karo.

RejectionReasons.title: Quiet Riots Kyun Reject Hote Hain
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Review process ko samjho
RejectionReasons.intro: Har nayi Quiet Riot ke liye ek Setup Guide review karta hai taaki wo platform fit ho aur real difference bana sake. Yeh wajahein hain jo suggestion approve nahi ho sakti:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingTitle: Pehle Se Maujud Quiet Riot Jaise
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Agar tera suggestion bilkul same ho kisi Quiet Riot ke jo pehle se exist karti hai, toh hum tera suggestion merge kar denge. Isse community focused rahe aur fragmentation nahi ho. Jitne zyada log ek Quiet Riot ke peeche, utna zyada impact.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Jab yeh hota hai, toh tu automatically existing Quiet Riot mein add ho jata hai aur action shuru kar sakta hai.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots shared issues ke bare mein hote hain, kisi specific insaan ko target karne ke liye nahi. Hum systemic problems mein focus karte hain — jaise poor broadband, rising energy costs, ya inadequate healthcare — personal grievances nahi specific log ke saath.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Agar tujhe kisi specific log ya public figure se frustration hai, toh underlying issue ke taur par frame kar. Jaise, CEO ko target karne ki jagah, company ke practices ke baare mein Quiet Riot suggest kar.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Hum Quiet Riots host nahi kar sakte jo illegal activities promote ya organize karte hain. Isme kuch bhi aata hai jo laws violate kare, violence promote kare, ya log ko risk mein dale.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Kabhi kabhi koi suggestion kisi aur wajah se fit nahi hota — shayad baut vague ho, ya Setup Guide ko zyada information chahiye. Aise cases mein tujhe message milega jo batayega ki kyun aur aage kya kar sakte ho.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: Agar tera suggestion reject ho, toh tu hamesha kar sakta hai:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Reframe aur phir se try kar — guidelines better fit karne ke liye naam ya description badal
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Maujud Quiet Riot join kar — tera issue shayad pehle se cover ho raha hai
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Setup Guide ko reply de — agar tujhe lagta hai rejection galat hai, toh tera case explain karte hue message bhej

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonymous First Rioters
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Anonymous hone ka matlab kya hai
AnonymousInfo.intro: Jab koi nayi Quiet Riot shuru karta hai, toh wo First Quiet Rioter ban jata hai. Yeh ek badge of honour hai — jo insaan pehle bolne ka courage rakhta hai.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Har koi nahi chahta ki uska naam publicly issue ke saath juda ho. Bilkul theek hai. Jab First Quiet Rioter anonymous rahe:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Uska naam aur profile picture issue page se chhupa ho jata hai
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Ek anonymous badge dikhai deta hai, taaki log janen ki kisi ne start kiya par pata nahi chale kaun
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides ko alag se pata hota hai (moderation ke liye)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: First Rioter baad mein apna man badal sakta hai aur publicly recognize hona chahta hai
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Anonymous rahe ke liye kayi wajahein ho sakti hain:
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Tu kisi company mein kaam karta hai jo issue se related hai
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Tu chahta hai ki cause apne aap bole
AnonymousInfo.whyPrivacy: Tu simply apni privacy value karta hai
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Agar tu anonymous Quiet Riot shuru kiya par baad mein recognize hona chahta hai, toh tu apni preference kabhi bhi change kar sakta hai apne inbox se ya ek Setup Guide ko message karke.

Setup.subtitle: Review aur manage Quiet Riot suggestions
Setup.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {1 suggestion} other {# suggestions}} review ke liye wait kar rahe hain
Setup.noSuggestions: Is category mein koi suggestions nahi hain
Setup.reasonAboutPeople: Log ke baare mein, issues ke nahi

Setup.approveAndGoLive: Translations approve karo aur Go Live
Setup.noTranslationsYet: Abhi koi translations generate nahi hue
Setup.translationsBeingGenerated: Anuvad swachalit roop se taiyar kiye ja rahe hain — lagbhag 30 second mein refresh karein.
Setup.translationSlower: Anuvad mein apeksha se adhik samay laga. Phir se prayaas karein ya ek minute mein refresh karein.

FirstRioterInfo.title: First Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: Quiet Riot shuru karne ka matlab
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Har Quiet Riot ek insaan se shuru hota h — First Quiet Rioter. Yeh woh insaan h jo ek issue ke baare mein bolne aur badlav ke liye movement shuru karne ki himmat rakhta h.
FirstRioterInfo.whatTitle: First Rioters ko kya milta h?
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Pehla insaan jo koi issue uthata h, usse special recognition milti h:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Issue page pe permanent First Quiet Rioter badge
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: Publicly recognize hone ya anonymous rehne ka choice
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Quiet Riot mein pehla member hone ke taur par automatic membership
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Updates jab tumhara suggestion review, approve, ya live hota h
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: First Rioters se kya expect kiya jata h?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: First Rioter hona ek honour ka badge h, bojh nahi. Strict requirements nahi hain, lekin hum First Rioters ko encourage karte hain:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Issue ko champion karo aur jo log care karte hain unhe share karo
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Evidence aur stories share karo jo problem ko illustrate kare
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Naye members ko welcome karo jo Quiet Riot mein join karte hain
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Jab tum Quiet Riot suggest karte ho, tum choose karte ho ki recognize hona h:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Public — tumhara naam aur profile issue page pe First Rioter ke taur par dikhai deta h
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anonymous — ek anonymous badge dikhai deta h, tumhari identity protect karte hue
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Tum apni preference kisi bhi time change kar sakte ho apne inbox se ya Setup Guide se contact karke
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Bas website ya WhatsApp bot ke through Quiet Riot suggest karo. Agar Setup Guides tumhare suggestion ko approve karte hain, tum us issue ke First Quiet Rioter ban jate ho.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Tumhara suggestion review process se guzarta h jahan Setup Guides check karte hain ki guidelines ko follow kar raha h. Woh aur info maang sakte hain, existing issue mein merge suggest kar sakte hain, ya approve karke live kar sakte hain.

Share.title: Aapka Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Apne Quiet Riots share ke baare mein aur jaankari paayein →
Share.heroSubtitle: Duniyabhar ke har Quiet Rioter ko Quiet Riots mein ek share diya jata hai — yeh company khud hai.
Share.ownershipTitle: Share Rakhne Ka Matlab Kya Hai?
Share.ownershipDesc: Shareholder hone ke nate, aap Quiet Riots ka asli hissa rakhte ho. Yeh token, badge ya metaphor nahi hai — yeh UK limited company mein ek genuine share hai, jo Companies House mein registered hai.
Share.ownershipPoint1: Aap Quiet Riots ke legal co-owner ban jaate ho
Share.ownershipPoint2: Aapka share company ke saath badhta hai
Share.ownershipPoint3: Agar company profits distribute kare to aapko dividends mil sakte hain
Share.ownershipPoint4: Aapko UK company law ke tahat shareholder rights hote hain
Share.considerationDesc: UK company law (Companies Act 2006) ke hisaab se, shares bilkul free nahi de sakte. Ek nominal payment — jo consideration kehlaata hai — zaroori hoti hai taaki share legally valid ho.
Share.considerationAmount: Aapke share ke liye consideration 10 pence hai (ya aapne apne currency mein barabar amount).
Share.considerationWallet: Yeh aapke Quiet Riots wallet se deduce hota hai jab aap aage badhte ho.
Share.considerationRefund: Agar aapka application reject ho jaye, to 10p automatically aapke wallet mein wapas aa jata hai.
Share.growthSharesTitle: Alag Alag Valuations Mein Kaise Kaam Karata Hai
Share.growthSharesDesc: Aapka share ek growth share structure use karta hai — ek special class jo sirf ek certain company valuation ke upar valuable banega. Iska matlab issue ke time par minimal tax.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares nominal value par issue hote hain. Aap 10p dete ho. Koi meaningful tax event nahi.
Share.seedDesc: Same nominal value. Growth share hurdle current valuation se upar set hota hai.
Share.seriesADesc: User share pool ke liye pre-emption rights waive kar di jaati hain. Hurdle current value ko minimize karta hai.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle ensure karta hai ki company ke high valuation ke baad bhi limited current value rahe.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool ek defined cap table percentage hai. Koi naya dilutive issuance nahi.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares ordinary tradeable shares mein convert ho jate hain. Sale par capital gains tax lagta hai.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Share rakhne ke saath kuch zimmedaariyaan hoti hain:
Share.responsibility1: Tax ke obligations aapne country ke hisaab se hote hain — qualified advisor se poochiye
Share.responsibility2: Koi guarantee nahi ki company kisi bhi valuation tak pahunchega
Share.responsibility3: Share structure company ke badhne ke saath modify ho sakta hai
Share.responsibility4: Yeh legal, tax ya investment advice nahi hai
Share.disclaimer1: Yeh simplified explanation hai — legal, tax ya investment advice nahi.
Share.disclaimer2: Har user ke tax obligations unke country ke hisaab se hote hain.
Share.disclaimer3: Koi guarantee nahi ki company kisi bhi valuation tak pahunchega.
Share.disclaimer4: Share structure company ke badhne ke saath modify ho sakta hai.
Share.disclaimer5: Users ko apne country ke qualified advisors se consult karna chahiye.
Share.eligibilityDesc: Share offer ke liye qualify karne ke liye aapko karna hoga:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Verified user ho (naam aur email ya phone confirm ho)
Share.eligibilityMet: Aap apne share ke liye eligible ho!
Share.proceedTitle: Apne Share ke Saath Aage Badhiye
Share.proceedDesc: Shareholder banne ke liye ready ho? 10p consideration aapke wallet se deduce hoga.
Share.proceedConfirm: 10p ka nominal payment aapke wallet se deduce hoga. Yeh share ke legally valid hone ke liye zaroori hai.
Share.proceedSuccess: Aapka application submit ho gaya! Share Guide jald hi iska review karega.
Share.insufficientFunds: Aage badhne ke liye aapke wallet mein kam se kam 10p hona zaroori hai.
Share.topUpFirst: Apne wallet ko top up karo
Share.declineDesc: Agar aap share nahi chahte, to aap offer ko permanently decline kar sakte ho. Koi payment nahi liya jayega.
Share.declineConfirm: Kya pakka ho? Yeh permanent hai aur undo nahi ho sakta. Aapko kabhi share ka offer nahi milega.
Share.declineSuccess: Aapne share offer decline kar diya.
Share.withdrawDesc: Apne application ko cancel karo aur 10p ka full refund paao.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Kya pakka ho? Aapka 10p aapke wallet mein wapas aa jayega.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Aapka application withdraw ho gaya. 10p aapke wallet mein refund kar diya gaya.
Share.reapplyTitle: Apne Share ke Liye Dobara Apply Karo
Share.reapplyDesc: Aapka pichla application reject ho gaya tha. Aap 10p payment ke saath dobara apply kar sakte ho.
Share.passwordDesc: Share section aapki security ke liye password-protected hai.
Share.identityDesc: Apne share application ko complete karne ke liye, hume aapki identity verify karni hogi. Yeh information encrypted aur securely stored hota hai.
Share.identitySuccess: Aapki identity verification ke liye submit ho gai.
Share.identityMustBe18: Aapki age kam se kam 18 saal honi chahiye.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: Aap apne share ke liye eligible ho
Share.issueRequestReceived: Aapka request received hua hai. Hum jald hi aapse contact karenge.

BotMessages.shareNeedMore: Yogya hone ke liye aapko {riots} aur Quiet Riots aur {actions} aur actions ki zarurat hai.
BotMessages.shareEligible: Aap apne Quiet Riots share ke liye paatra hain! Apni profile par jayein ya aage badhne ke liye "apply for share" kahein.
BotMessages.shareApplicationStatus: Aapke share application ki status {status} hai.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Aap apne Quiet Riots share ke liye yogya hain!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Progress: {riotsJoined}/3 Quiet Riots mein shamil hue, {actionsTaken}/10 actions kiye gaye{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Aap abhi tak share ke liye paatra nahi hain. Zyada Quiet Riots mein shamil hon aur zyada actions karein.
BotMessages.shareCannotApplyStatus: Application nahi kar sakte — aapki current status {status} hai.
BotMessages.shareInsufficientBalance: Wallet balance aparyapt hai. Aapko kam se kam 10p chahiye (aapke paas {balance}p hai). Pehle apna wallet top up karein.
BotMessages.sharePaymentFailed: Payment fail raha — kripya punah prayas karein.
BotMessages.shareApplied: Aapke wallet se 10p kaat liye gaye hain. Aapka share application ab samikshādhin hai. Ek Share Guide jald hi iska review karega.
BotMessages.shareDeclined: Aapne share offer ko sthayi roop se decline kar diya hai. Koi payment nahi liya gaya. Yeh decision ulta nahi kiya ja sakta.
BotMessages.shareCannotDecline: Decline nahi kar sakte — ya to aapke paas koi eligible share offer nahi hai ya aapka application pehle se hi process mein hai.
BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Aapka share application wapas le liya gaya hai aur aapke 10p aapke wallet mein wapas kar diye gaye hain.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Wapas nahi le sakte — aapka application shayad wapsi yogya state mein nahi hai.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: Aapke wallet se 10p kaat liye gaye hain. Aapka share re-application ab samikshādhin hai.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Punah application nahi kar sakte — aapka application shayad rejected state mein nahi hai.
BotMessages.shareNoApplication: Aapke paas abhi tak koi share application nahi hai.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: Aapka question Share Guide team ko bhej diya gaya hai. Aapko apne inbox mein reply milega.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Achhi khabar — aapka Quiet Riot "{name}" manjoor ho gaya! Jab yeh live hoga to hum aapko bataenge.
BotMessages.suggestionRejected: Aapka sujhaav "{name}" ko 👍 nahi mila kyunki {reason}.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Aapka sujhaav "{name}" ko 👍 nahi mila kyunki {reason}. Aur jaanein: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
BotMessages.suggestionMerged: Aapka sujhaav "{name}" ek maujood Quiet Riot jaisa hai. Humne aapko jod diya — dekhein: {link}
BotMessages.suggestionMoreInfo: Setup Guide ka "{name}" ke baare mein ek sawaal hai: {notes}
BotMessages.suggestionGoLive: Aapka Quiet Riot "{name}" ab live hai! Ise un doston ke saath share karein jinhe is mudde ki chinta hai.
BotMessages.rejectionCloseToExisting: ek maujood Quiet Riot se bahut milta-julta
BotMessages.rejectionAboutPeople: yeh muddon ki bajaye logon ko nishana banata hai
